Connection Requirements
🔑 API Credentials
  • ✓ API Key from your broker portal
  • ✓ Secret Key (never stored in plaintext)
  • ✓ Paper trading or live account
🛡️ Security
  • ✓ AES-256 encrypted key storage
  • ✓ Read + trade permissions only
  • ✓ No withdrawal access required
⚡ Capabilities
  • ✓ Real-time order execution
  • ✓ Position and P&L sync
  • ✓ Strategy auto-trading
